title: Cobblemon: Perfect Partners
description: A companion-focused Cobblemon addon that adds headpats, walking friendship, gifts, memories, Contest Conditions, Shiny Leaves, ribbons, auras, follow assist, and in-game configuration for deeper Pokémon bonding.
body:
# Cobblemon: Perfect Partners

**Cobblemon: Perfect Partners** is a cozy companion addon for Cobblemon that makes your Pokémon feel more like true partners. Pet them, travel together, earn gifts, build memories, train Contest Conditions, collect Shiny Leaves, unlock ribbons, and customize everything through an in-game config menu.

## Main Features

### Partner interactions

Right-click your own Pokémon with an empty hand to give them a headpat. Headpats can raise friendship, show heart particles, play animations, and help train the **Cute** Contest Condition.

Sneak + right-click still opens Cobblemon’s normal Pokémon menu.

### Walking friendship

Keep a Pokémon out while exploring to slowly build friendship and companion progress. Walking together can trigger partner messages, train the **Tough** Contest Condition, help with follow-assist behavior, and allow Pokémon to find gifts or Shiny Leaves.

### Partner gifts

High-friendship Pokémon can occasionally find gifts while travelling. Gifts are held by the Pokémon first and can be accepted by interacting with them.

Gift pools can include useful items, rare finds, Cobblemon evolution items, special rewards, and contest scarves depending on friendship and config settings.

### Memories

Special moments with your Pokémon can become keepsake memories, including long journeys, close calls, returning home, gifts, and Friendship Bracelet moments.

View memories with:

```mcfunction
/companionbonds memories
```

### Contest Conditions

Perfect Partners adds Contest-style partner stats inspired by classic Pokémon games:

- **Cool** — battle wins
- **Beauty** — healing after danger
- **Cute** — headpats
- **Smart** — time near workstations
- **Tough** — travelling together

Each condition ranges from `0–255`. Maxed conditions can unlock Cobblemon-native marks, ribbons, and aura effects.

Open the Contest tracker with:

```mcfunction
/contest
```

Default keybind: **K**

### Friendship Bracelet

The **Friendship Bracelet** is a special held item for partner Pokémon. It boosts friendship and Contest growth, gives a subtle partner effect, and can help a Pokémon endure a knockout-style hit.

### Shiny Leaves and Leaf Crowns

Walking Pokémon can find **Shiny Leaves** in grassy or plant-like places, including grass blocks, tall grass, ferns, flowers, moss, leaves, vines, saplings, azalea, seagrass, and similar blocks.

Each Pokémon can collect five Shiny Leaf slots: **A, B, C, D, and E**. These are not map areas; they are collection slots based on the Pokémon’s nature and the route or biome where it is walking.

Collect all five to create a **Shiny Crown** memory and unlock a certificate.

View certificates with:

```mcfunction
/leafcertificate
```

or:

```mcfunction
/partnercertificate
```

### Trainer Cards and certificates

The mod includes visual screens for partner progress, Trainer Cards, Shiny Leaf certificates, ribbons, marks, and companion milestones.

Open the Trainer Card with:

```mcfunction
/trainercard
```

## In-game config menu

Server operators can configure the mod in-game with:

```mcfunction
/companionbonds config
```

Config categories include:

- Friendship
- Follow Assist
- Gifts
- Friendship Bracelet
- Contest
- Memories
- Shiny Leaves
- Visuals
- Utility Actions

The config menu supports scrolling, hover descriptions, and server-side saving to:

```text
config/perfect_partners.json
```

## Commands

### Player commands

```mcfunction
/companionbonds guide
/companionbonds commandguide
/companionbonds memories
/contest
/contest <slot>
/contest show <slot>
/contest shout <slot>
/contest aura <slot> <aura>
/contest messages <slot>
/contest marks <slot>
/contest party
/contest guide
/trainercard [slot]
/leafcertificate [slot]
/partnercertificate [slot]
```

### Admin/config commands

```mcfunction
/companionbonds stats
/companionbonds debug_gift
/companionbonds reload
/companionbonds config
/contest admin ...
```

Config commands require operator/config permission.

## Items

Perfect Partners adds:

- Partner Journal
- Friendship Bracelet
- Shiny Leaf
- Shiny Crown

Players receive a **Partner Journal** the first time they join a world. Use it to open the guide, or sneak-use it to open the partner tracker.

## Requirements

- Minecraft **1.21.1**
- Java **21**
- Cobblemon **1.7.0+**
- Fabric version requires **Fabric API**
- Available for **Fabric** and **NeoForge**

## Environment

Install on both **client and server** for the full experience.
